posts.title: Why AI won’t kill SaaS
posts.summary: The recent tech selloff sparked fears of a SaaSpocalypse. Here is why the death of software subscriptions is a myth, and how AI agents are creating a developer boom. The post Why AI won’t kill SaaS first appeared on TechTalks .
posts.author: Ben Dickson
